# graphbrain Code Brain

> A project-level knowledge brain for AI coding agents.

## Capabilities

- Knowledge graph extraction from codebases (15+ languages via AST + regex)
- Governed wiki pages: modules, entities, concepts, decisions
- Lifecycle hooks: SessionStart, PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, Stop, SessionEnd
- Skill routing: implicit activation via file context, intent match, stack detection
- 4-phase sync pipeline: EXTRACT -> UPDATE -> VERIFY -> COMMIT
- 14-point lint verification with swappable rubrics
- Decision tracking with self-learning loop
- Token budgets: protocol.md < 500t, routing.md < 400t, pages < 30K

## Entry Points

- `.ctx/protocol.md` — Start here. Core principles + navigation pointers.
- `.ctx/routing.md` — Keyword to page routing.
- `.ctx/index.md` — Full page catalog with token counts.

## Skills

### Core (always installed)
- `skills/requirements/SKILL.md` — PRD generation with boolean ACs
- `skills/design/SKILL.md` — Architecture docs and ADRs
- `skills/implementation/SKILL.md` — TDD with atomic commits
- `skills/testing/SKILL.md` — Test plans and coverage
- `skills/deployment/SKILL.md` — Safe deployment with rollback
- `skills/maintenance/SKILL.md` — Bug fixes and tech debt

### Detected (auto-installed by stack)
- `skills/react/SKILL.md` — React conventions and patterns
- `skills/typescript/SKILL.md` — TypeScript type safety
- `skills/python/SKILL.md` — Python conventions
- `skills/go/SKILL.md` — Go error handling and testing
- `skills/data-modeling/SKILL.md` — Prisma and schema design
- `skills/security/SKILL.md` — Secret management and OWASP

## Commands

- `npx graphbrain init` — Initialize .ctx/ scaffold + detect skills
- `npx graphbrain extract` — Extract knowledge graph (Python 3.8+, zero deps)
- `npx graphbrain extract -u` — Incremental extraction (changed files only)
- `npx graphbrain sync` — Full sync pipeline
- `npx graphbrain lint` — Read-only lint audit
- `npx graphbrain serve` — Start MCP query server
- `npx graphbrain add-skill <name>` — Install skill from registry

## Graph Query API (MCP)

- `query_graph(query, mode=bfs|dfs)` — Traversal with token budget
- `god_nodes()` — Highest-degree abstractions
- `get_neighbors(node)` — Immediate connections
- `shortest_path(from, to)` — Relationship trace
